entries.title: ISO 27001 (Arabic alias)
entries.answer: ISO 27001 معيار دولي لإدارة أمن المعلومات.

entries.title: ISO 27001
entries.answer: ISO 27001 is an international standard for information security management.

entries.title: NCA short keyword
entries.answer: NCA is the National Cybersecurity Authority of Saudi Arabia.

entries.title: NCA long keyword
entries.answer: Same regulator, longer keyword on purpose.
